title: coord digest/nudge command hook (SessionStart + UserPromptSubmit) + heartbeat log

tests.summary: 5 passed (nudge+heartbeat, conflict surfaced on UserPromptSubmit, fail-open on malformed, installer idempotent/owner-tagged/clobber-abort)

ptySafe.summary: command-type hook only; no model call; reuses mechanical digest (file scans). No claude -p / Agent-SDK path.

codexPwTest.note: command hook — correctness gate is the committed vitest suite

video.note: covered by the CO5 observability demo (co5-observe.cast) which fires the hook + tails heartbeat
